subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My Glory! Thou didst make mention without a tongue, and now doth the Tongue of the All-Merciful make mention from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی ذکر بی لسان نمودی حال لسان رحمن از قبل او خود را ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat], @purpose; goal of creation
